prompt:
Create a premium 1:1 luxury fashion collage advertisement featuring the same young stylish Japanese-Korean male model in multiple rebellious fashion portraits inside one edgy editorial composition.
Include:
one dramatic black-and-white close-up portrait with intense expression
one grunge-inspired Korean streetwear outfit with leather jacket and chains
one candid walking shot in underground subway station with headphones
one luxury studio pose with oversized coat and dark fashion styling
one chaotic Gen-Z selfie frame with flash lighting, tattoos, rings, and attitude
The man should have messy textured hair, light beard, piercing eyes, glowing skin, rebellious fashion aura, and luxury accessories in every frame.
Design the overall layout like a luxury underground fashion magazine with asymmetrical collage cuts, scratched textures, torn posters, glossy reflections, layered graphics, and rockstar editorial aesthetics.
Use dark monochrome tones mixed with red neon accents, cinematic shadows, moody lighting, chrome textures, and high-fashion rebel energy. Add tiny distressed typography subtly merged into corners and background textures with words like “NOIR”, “REBORN”, “REBEL”, and “NIGHT DRIVE”.
Ultra realistic, cinematic color grading, editorial fashion photography, luxury underground campaign style, highly detailed, 8K.
